---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a local WebRTC experiment or diagnostics improvement
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

Describe the experiment, diagnosis, or comparison that RTCTraining should make
easier.

## Proposed Behavior

Describe the desired user-facing behavior.

## Scope Check

- [ ] Fits Local/LAN trusted-network usage.
- [ ] Does not require accounts or authentication.
- [ ] Does not require TURN, SFU, MCU, public deployment, or long-term storage.

## Useful Material

Add screenshots, CSV samples, browser stats fields, or links that help explain
the request.
